upgrade.name: Atlas lane Chronicle quest board
upgrade.summary: Added a reusable routable Chronicle detail view that turns lane checkpoints, trail history, blockers, event mix, current milestone, and next action into a compact game-like quest board.

research.takeaway: Quest logs are most useful when they preserve meaningful events for returning players who need to remember what happened.
Playful work tracking can stay useful when visual cards preserve task order and remain easy to scan across projects.
Milestones help complex work by forcing clarity, definition, and recurring progress checks.

implementation: Added chronicle to hash routing and lane detail tabs in web/app.js.
Added a reusable Chronicle renderer that derives all content from existing lane snapshot fields.
Rendered current run, quest progress, signal cards, checkpoint spine, event-mix bars, blocker cells, next action, and expandable stream rows.
Added responsive Chronicle CSS tuned for the side detail panel width.
Updated web/index.html cache keys for the new app and stylesheet version.
Documented the Chronicle view and deep link in web/README.md.
